description_text: Universal Anti-Scratch Car Rear Bumper Lip Diffuser Splitter Canard Glossy Black Product Description Brand Unbranded Color Black Fitment Type Direct Replacement Manufacturer Part Number Does Not Apply Material Carbon Fiber Number of Pieces 2 Placement on Vehicle Left,Lower,Rear,Right Surface Finish Polished Type Fender Flares Warranty 1 Year Country/Region of Manufacture China Universal Carbon Fiber Rear Bumper Lip Diffuser Splitter Canard Protector Car x2 Package Included: 2x Rear Lip Wrap Angle Splitters 5x Bolts Fitment: Car Universal Specification: -Type:Rear Lip Wrap Angle Splitters -Material:Polyurethane (ABS) -Color:Carbon Fiber Look -Size:44*11cm/17.32*4.33in -Weight:256g -Placement on Vehicle:Front, Left, Lower, Rear -Fitment Type:Performance/Custom Feature: -Comes with 2PC Rear lip wrap angle splitters. -Please measure your Rear lip wrap angle and make sure these splitters will fit. -Custom fit most vehicles, product may require drilling holes and apply bolts to attach to your bumper. -Use double side adhesive tape or drill holes and bolt on to your bumper. -Give your car a more aggressive racing look. -Professional installation is highly recommended. Notice: 1.Please allow 1-3CM differs due to manual measurement. 2.If you are not sure whether the item fits your car,please send me some photos of your car.(the front,the side and the back) 3.Any question please contact me freely. All questions will be replied within 1-2 business day. There might be some delay during weekends and holidays. 4.Customer satisfaction is our number one priority. Please contact us to resolve any problem before leaving neutral or negative feedback.We will do our best to satisfy each customer. Payment We only accept payment through Paypal. Please make sure you have a valid PayPal account prior bidding. Please pay for your item within 5 days of the auction end time Delivery details Shipping Method All items will be shipped to buyer's ebay address. Before you pay, please make sure your address in ebay matches the address you would like us to ship to. 1. TO united state:ship with epack with tracking#( 6-15days) 2. To UK, using special line,Uk Royal mail( 6-15days) 3.To other country, ship via Singapore or hongkon air mail(15-35days) Delivery may be delayed during weekends and holidays. We'll strive to provide you the most reliable way of shipping. But sometimes it is highly depended on the courier companies and local customs, especially for i nternational shipping. Normally, the shipment may takes 15-45 days to your Ebay registered address.
